evals.prompt: List all dashboards on our Grafana and tell me what's there
evals.expected_output: Lists the 4 existing dashboards (api-gateway, generator, Service Logs, Tenant Usage) with their UIDs and folder location

evals.prompt: Create a dashboard called 'Error Rate Monitor' with a timeseries panel showing error counts from ClickHouse, put it in the default folder. After creating it, verify it exists, then delete it.
evals.expected_output: Creates a dashboard with a properly configured ClickHouse timeseries panel, confirms creation via API, then deletes it and confirms deletion

evals.prompt: Check what datasources are configured in Grafana and create an annotation on the api-gateway dashboard saying we deployed v3.0 with tags 'deploy' and 'api-gateway'. Then list the annotations to confirm it was created.
evals.expected_output: Lists the ClickHouse datasource, creates an annotation on dashboard id 3, then retrieves annotations showing the new one
